title: Red/Orange GUI
description: This texture pack gives the Minecraft GUI a completely new look by replacing the classic colors with stylish red and orange tones. Perfect for players who want a fresh, warm color palette for their interface!
body:
Red/Orange GUI is a Texture Pack for 1.21 that adds various Orange GUI texture changes.

Like:

-Hotbar -Inventory -Hearts -Hunger_Bar -Experience_Bar and more!
